title: Blinko
release_note:
- Blinko 1.8.7 adds MiniMax as a first-class LLM provider.
- It fixes upload filename sanitization, tag filter reset behavior, and Turkish translations.
- The release also streamlines search state and URL updates, adds file upload tests, removes CircleCI config, and refreshes localization content.
description:
Blinko is an open-source personal knowledge management and information recording platform, focused on providing users with a lightweight, efficient, and scalable note-taking and knowledge organisation experience. Through modular design and modern technology stack, it enables users to quickly capture ideas, organise knowledge, and build their own information system.

The project emphasises simplicity and customisability, supporting flexible combinations of various content types (text, tags, links, etc.), while its clear structured design helps users achieve efficient retrieval and association within vast amounts of information. Blinko also provides excellent extensibility, making it easy for developers to customise and enhance functionality according to their needs.

In practical use, Blinko balances usability and functionality, offering a smooth experience for daily note-taking, knowledge accumulation, or project document management – an ideal knowledge tool for long-term personal growth.

**Main features:**

- Lightweight note system for quick content recording and editing
- Tags and structured organisation to improve information retrieval efficiency
- Support for multiple content types (text, links, etc.)
- Extensible architecture for custom functionality and plugin development
- Clean interface design focused on content rather than complex operations

**Learn more:**

- [Blinko GitHub](https://github.com/blinkospace/blinko)
tagline: Blinko is an AI-powered card note-taking project. Designed for individuals who want to quickly capture and organize their fleeting thoughts. Blinko allows users to seamlessly jot down ideas the moment they strike, ensuring that no spark of creativity is lost.
